name: envmetrics
description: A lightweight, cgroup-aware Node.js library that returns current resource usage as a fraction of actual usable limits.

scripts.test:integration: docker run --rm --memory=256m --cpus=0.5 -v "$(pwd)/src":/app/src -v "$(pwd)/test":/app/test -v "$(pwd)/package.json":/app/package.json -v "$(pwd)/tsconfig.json":/app/tsconfig.json -w /app node:22 sh -c "npm install --silent && npx tsx test/integration/run.ts"
